description: This file is a shell script that performs an end-to-end smoke test for an orchestration API. It creates a document, attaches extracted text, initiates a run-all orchestration process, polls for build status, and fetches orchestration details. The script verifies API functionality, including health checks, document handling, and build monitoring.

methods.name: have_jq
methods.description: Checks if 'jq' command is available in the environment.

methods.name: require_cmd
methods.description: Ensures a required command-line tool is available; exits if missing.

methods.name: c
methods.description: Wrapper function around 'curl' to include default headers for API calls.

methods.name: json_get
methods.description: Extracts a value from JSON output using a jq-like expression, with a fallback parser.
